title: Foshan, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Foshan, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Foshan is a city in Guangdong with a population of 9,498,000. A historic city in Guangdong known for its ceramic industry, martial arts heritage (Ip Man, Bruce Lee), and Cantonese opera.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
